description_long: This is a modern laptop with a matte black chassis and a red-accented keyboard, featuring a large touchpad with matching red borders. The screen displays a Windows 7 startup logo, indicating the device is powered on. The keyboard is backlit with red illumination, and the keys are arranged in a standard QWERTY layout without a numeric keypad. The laptop's exterior is sleek and smooth, with no visible branding or stickers on the lid or palm rest. The rear of the device is plain and unadorned, and no ports are visible along the sides in the provided views. The overall design is minimalistic and contemporary, suitable for both professional and casual urban environments.
description: A sleek black laptop with a red-backlit keyboard and a large screen displaying the Windows 7 logo. The design is modern, minimalistic, and free of visible branding or stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with the Windows 7 logo, red-backlit keyboard, and large touchpad with red borders.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile, red-accented keyboard, and the open screen; no ports or branding visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unmarked black lid with no visible logos, stickers, or ports.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the red-accented keyboard and touchpad, with no visible ports or branding.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and powered on, displaying the Windows 7 startup logo.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout, no numeric keypad, red backlighting, function row present.
